title: Noodle & Soul Regulars
content: Noodle & Soul is Rin's eight-seat ramen shop, where every bowl is matched to a customer's mood. Emi gets a lighter broth when she forgets to eat while writing. Nori orders the same Tuesday bowl but always notices seasonal changes. Taro eats slowly from bowls he carved himself, testing their balance. Rin believes cooking is a conversation without forcing anyone to speak. Her shop is small, but people leave feeling fed in more ways than one.
